branch_manifest.description: Dynamic sp_executesql builds and executes INSERT INTO silver.DimCurrency from bronze.Currency

warnings.message: Write logic is embedded in a dynamic sp_executesql variable — SQL is not statically visible for fixture generation. Rationale recorded for reviewer acceptance.

details.recovered_sql: INSERT INTO silver.DimCurrency (CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName) SELECT CurrencyCode, CurrencyName FROM MigrationTest.bronze.Currency
